title: Sinomalus halliana
taxonomy: Sinomalus halliana is a species of beetle in the family Carabidae. It is classified within the genus Sinomalus. The family Carabidae is commonly known as ground beetles. Ground beetles are part of the order Coleoptera, which is one of the largest orders of insects.
